title: REST API has no authentication or rate limiting
description:
**Security / Production Readiness**

The REST API (api.py) accepts any request without authentication:
- POST /sim creates simulations (resource allocation)
- DELETE /sim deletes simulations
- POST /chaos/* modifies simulation behavior

For a development/testing tool this might be acceptable, but:
1. If exposed on a network, anyone can disrupt simulations
2. No rate limiting means DoS via rapid simulation creation
3. No audit trail of who made changes

If the simulator is intended to be multi-tenant or network-accessible:
- Add optional API key authentication
- Add rate limiting (e.g., via slowapi)
- Add request logging

If single-user only:
- Document that it should only bind to localhost
- Consider adding --bind-address CLI flag that defaults to 127.0.0.1

Currently it only binds to 127.0.0.1 (good default), but this should be documented.

Files: api.py, server.py
close_reason: bind_host param + --bind-address CLI + docstring security note; no auth (dev tool only)
